title: Dashboard
subtitle: Monitor performance, review leaks, and track your technical evolution tournament by tournament.

kpis.roiTooltip: Cumulative return on investment. Positive ROI means you're profiting above the average buy-in. Reference: consistent regular players sit between +20% and +80% in MTTs.
kpis.itmTooltip: Percentage of tournaments where you finished in the money. Field average is ~18%. Above 22% suggests solid or conservative play; below may indicate early bust-outs.
kpis.standardTooltip: Average percentage of decisions classified as 'standard' (score â‰¤ 0.08). Goal: above 70%. Below 60% indicates significant errors costing real EV.
kpis.eventsTooltip: Total volume of analyzed tournaments. Samples smaller than 30 tournaments may have financial results skewed by variance. Decision analysis is reliable from ~500 hands.

linkCoach.message: Have a coach? Link your profile to share your history.

aiConfidence.title: AI Confidence
aiConfidence.tooltip: Indicates the reliability of analyses based on data volume. The more tournaments imported, the more accurate the leak recommendations and study plan.
aiConfidence.summary: {{count}} tournaments analyzed. Sufficient volume to suggest reliable adjustments.
aiConfidence.empty: Import tournaments to activate AI confidence analysis.

leaks.tooltip: The most frequent and costly mistakes detected in your history. Each leak represents a recurring sub-optimal decision pattern â€” fixing them has a direct impact on your ROI.
leaks.title: Top Leaks Detected

ghost.tooltip: Summary of your drill activity in the last 30 days. Overdue drills (red) indicate spots that need review â€” skipping them increases the chance of repeating the same mistake in live play.
ghost.title: Ghost Table
ghost.noActivity: No drills in the last 30 days.

bankroll.tooltip: Cumulative financial result curve tournament by tournament. Shows real variance and long-term trend â€” not just isolated results. Useful for deciding stake adjustments.
bankroll.title: Bankroll evolution
bankroll.demo: Demo â€¢ import tournaments to see your data

decisions.title: Decision Quality
decisions.tooltip: Distribution of all your decisions by quality. Standard = within expected range (score â‰¤ 0.08). Marginal = acceptable but suboptimal. Mistakes reduce your long-term ROI.

streets.title: Performance by Street
streets.tooltip: Standard decision rate (score â‰¤ 0.08) per street. Streets in orange or red indicate where your leaks are concentrated.

positions.title: Performance by Position
positions.tooltip: Standard decision rate by table position. BTN and CO usually have positional advantage. Defensive BB and SB are where most players lose the most equity.

form.title: Recent Form
form.tooltip: Average decision quality in recent tournaments. Green = standard session, yellow = marginal, orange/red = session with significant errors.

icm.title: ICM Pressure
icm.tooltip: ICM (Independent Chip Model) measures the monetary value of chips in MTTs. Under high pressure (bubble, FT), mistakes cost much more than the nominal chip value.

pressure.title: Pressure Collapse
pressure.tooltip: Compares your decision quality across ICM pressure levels. A solid player maintains consistent scores regardless of pressure. A delta above 8pts indicates collapse.
pressure.collapseSummary: Score +{{delta}}pts worse under high ICM pressure â€” focus on bubble and FT spots.
pressure.stableSummary: Stable performance â€” only {{delta}}pts variation between high pressure and no pressure.

drift.alertDesc: {{n}} recent sessions with technical quality below your baseline â€” possible tilt or fatigue.

level.tooltip: Your current level based on your average Standard% across recent tournaments. Each level requires a higher threshold of correct decisions â€” advancing means your mistakes have consistently decreased.
level.title: My Level
level.noData: Import at least 5 tournaments to calculate your level.

playerStats.noData: Import tournaments to calculate your playing profile.

dna.title: Strategic Profile
dna.tooltip: Strategic signature based on your real decision patterns. Each axis represents a dimension of your playing style.
dna.noData: Import tournaments to calculate your strategic profile.

archetypeDesc.TAG: Selective and aggressive when entering â€” winning profile in regular MTTs.
archetypeDesc.LAG: Plays many pots and applies pressure â€” effective, but requires range calibration.
archetypeDesc.Nit: Folds too much â€” loses passive equity and gets exploited by regulars.
archetypeDesc.Calling Station: Calls too much â€” makes it easy for opponents to extract EV.
archetypeDesc.Balanced: Well-rounded profile â€” good range control across multiple positions.

empty.title: Initialize your tactical base
empty.loadingDesc: The HUD will be populated once the scan is complete.
empty.desc: Upload your hand history file (PokerStars .txt) to calibrate the HUD and expose your table leaks.
empty.m1desc: Automatic identification of sub-optimal patterns in your game tree, with severity and EV loss calculated hand by hand.
empty.m2desc: Variance tracking and bankroll evolution chart tournament by tournament, for stake decisions with confidence.
empty.m3desc: Conversational AI analysis with your real data: ranges, ICM, leaks and personalized study plan.

leakCausalMap.tooltip: Visualizes which leaks co-occur in the same hands or sessions. Thicker lines indicate stronger correlation â€” when two leaks appear together, they usually share a common root cause.
leakCausalMap.title: Leak Causal Map

career.tooltip: Projects when you will reach each level based on your real improvement curve. The dotted line is an estimate â€” not a guarantee. The main value is seeing which leak is blocking your next level.
career.title: Career Trajectory
career.noData: Import at least 5 tournaments to generate your career projection.

cognitiveFailure.tooltip: Detects emotional patterns that affect sequential decision quality â€” for example, becoming overly aggressive right after folding several hands in a row. Identifying the trigger is the first step to correcting it.
cognitiveFailure.title: Cognitive Patterns
cognitiveFailure.noData: Insufficient data. Import more tournaments to detect cognitive patterns.
cognitiveFailure.noPatterns: No cognitive patterns detected. Your game is cognitively consistent.

descriptions.revenge_aggression: Aggressive mistakes shortly after a sequence of correct folds
descriptions.fear_folding: Incorrect folds after consecutive aggressive mistakes (blowup hands)
descriptions.sunk_cost: Bad calls across multiple streets of the same hand (chasing the pot)
descriptions.entitlement_tilt: Cascading mistakes after a long streak of correct decisions
descriptions.compensation_call: Incorrect calls in the hands following a correct fold of a strong hand

strategicTwin.title: Strategic Patterns
strategicTwin.tooltip: Identifies spots (street + action + ICM pressure combinations) where your error rate exceeds your personal average by at least 10%. Reveals costly habits invisible when looking at individual decisions.
strategicTwin.noData: Import more tournaments to build your strategic profile. Minimum: 30 analysed decisions.
strategicTwin.noPatterns: No costly spots detected. Keep playing to refine your analysis.
